description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by four matching wooden chairs, each featuring a cross-back design. The table and chairs are constructed from a medium-toned wood with a visible grain pattern, giving a rustic and natural appearance. The table top is flat and spacious, suitable for seating four people comfortably. The legs of both the table and chairs are straight and sturdy, with simple joinery and no visible embellishments. The set is cohesive in design, with all chairs matching the table in both material and style. This furniture set is practical for communal dining or gathering spaces, blending functionality with a classic, homey aesthetic.
description: A rectangular wooden dining table with four matching cross-back chairs, all featuring a rustic wood grain finish and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full table and all four chairs, with the cross-back design of the chairs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the table's length and the alignment of the chairs, highlighting the wood grain and chair backs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the table and the backrests of the chairs.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the table's length and the uniformity of the chair design.
